# Cheap Bankruptcy Lawyer - How to Find Affordable Help [2026]
> How to find a cheap bankruptcy lawyer without sacrificing quality. Legal aid, pro bono, flat-fee attorneys, and cost comparison by state....

## About
cheapbankruptcylawyer.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Required Credit Counseling for Bankruptcy: https://cheapbankruptcylawyer.org/credit-counseling.html
- Bankruptcy Filing Fee Waivers: https://cheapbankruptcylawyer.org/fee-waivers.html
- Cheap Bankruptcy Lawyer - How to Find Affordable Help: https://cheapbankruptcylawyer.org/
- Free Legal Aid for Bankruptcy Filers: https://cheapbankruptcylawyer.org/legal-aid.html
- Filing Bankruptcy Pro Se (Without an Attorney): https://cheapbankruptcylawyer.org/pro-se.html
- Reduced-Fee Bankruptcy Attorneys and Programs: https://cheapbankruptcylawyer.org/reduced-fee.html
- Privacy Policy: https://cheapbankruptcylawyer.org/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
